metadata.description: Navigate to the billing admin workspace dashboard root
Find and interact with the account search field and results to locate ACME-448; inspect DOM to determine selectors and presence of account row
Click the account ACME-448 from the results to open the account details page
Locate the spending cap edit controls and the form for updating cap and reason
Submit the spending cap update form setting cap to 3000 and reason 'temporary procurement exception', include tags and requester info if available in form

planner.rationale: Standard admin console flow: navigate to accounts list, locate account ACME-448 via search/filter, open account details, edit spending cap, provide reason, and submit the update. Use read_dom to inspect pages and a single submit_form for the update. Keep steps minimal and within max_actions.
